title: VolumetricModel Object
description: The main volumetric graph object. It has a parent component and is defined in this parent component's space. It also contains the primary and cell graphs.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: createSampler
methods.description: Creates a VolumetricSampler object that can be used to sample the volumetric model.

methods.name: getGraph
methods.description: Returns a graph from the volumetric model.

methods.name: registerCustomSDFCallback
methods.description: Handling for custom Signed Distance Field callback events. These can be registered by the API client, they will provide a string ID and a handler object that implements the abstract methods. To use the callback, a GeometryGraphNodeProperty's customSDFCallbackID should be set to the same string ID.   Register a custom Signed Distance Field callback handler with a given ID.

methods.name: removeCustomSDFCallback
methods.description: De-register the Signed Distance Field callback handler with the given ID.

properties.name: boundaryBody
properties.description: Get or set the main boundary body for this volumetric model. The volumetric model is bound by the axis aligned bounding box and will only be rendered within this body.

properties.name: isLightBulbOn
properties.description: Is the light bulb / eye (as displayed in the browser) controlling the model's visibility on.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

related_samples.name: Volumetric Custom Feature API Sample
related_samples.description:
Demonstrates how to create a Volumetric Custom Feature using the API for graph creation.

To run the sample script, have a document open in Fusion’s DESIGN workspace. This script will create a component with a box by sketching then extruding that sketch. It will then use that box as a boundary body and create a Volumetric Custom Feature.

The script will the create a gyroid lattice using the Volumetric Model API with the appropriate Graphs, Nodes and Connections for a minimal example. Finally, the script will convert that Volumetric Model to Mesh using the API and the VolumetricModelToMeshFeature.

boundaryBody.title: VolumetricModel.boundaryBody Property
boundaryBody.description: Get or set the main boundary body for this volumetric model. The volumetric model is bound by the axis aligned bounding box and will only be rendered within this body.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricModel_var.boundaryBody

isLightBulbOn.title: VolumetricModel.isLightBulbOn Property
isLightBulbOn.description: Is the light bulb / eye (as displayed in the browser) controlling the model's visibility on.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricModel_var.isLightBulbOn

# Set the value of the property.
volumetricModel_var.isLightBulbOn = propertyValue

isValid.title: VolumetricModel.isValid Property
isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricModel_var.isValid

objectType.title: VolumetricModel.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricModel_var.objectType

# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricModel_var.parentComponent

classType.title: VolumetricModel.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

createSampler.title: VolumetricModel.createSampler Method
createSampler.description: Creates a VolumetricSampler object that can be used to sample the volumetric model.
createSampler.return_description: Returns a VolumetricSampler object that will sample this VolumetricModel.

getGraph.title: VolumetricModel.getGraph Method
getGraph.description: Returns a graph from the volumetric model.

parameters.name: graphType
parameters.description: Which kind of graph to return.

related_samples.name: Volumetric Custom Feature API Sample
related_samples.description:
Demonstrates how to create a Volumetric Custom Feature using the API for graph creation.

To run the sample script, have a document open in Fusion’s DESIGN workspace. This script will create a component with a box by sketching then extruding that sketch. It will then use that box as a boundary body and create a Volumetric Custom Feature.

The script will the create a gyroid lattice using the Volumetric Model API with the appropriate Graphs, Nodes and Connections for a minimal example. Finally, the script will convert that Volumetric Model to Mesh using the API and the VolumetricModelToMeshFeature.

registerCustomSDFCallback.title: VolumetricModel.registerCustomSDFCallback Method
registerCustomSDFCallback.description: Handling for custom Signed Distance Field callback events. These can be registered by the API client, they will provide a string ID and a handler object that implements the abstract methods. To use the callback, a GeometryGraphNodeProperty's customSDFCallbackID should be set to the same string ID. Register a custom Signed Distance Field callback handler with a given ID.
registerCustomSDFCallback.return_description: True if registered successfully. False otherwise.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID to be used in a GeometryGraphNodeProperty's customSDFCallbackID.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback object implemented by the client.

removeCustomSDFCallback.title: VolumetricModel.removeCustomSDFCallback Method
removeCustomSDFCallback.description: De-register the Signed Distance Field callback handler with the given ID.
removeCustomSDFCallback.return_description: True if removed successfully. False otherwise.
